summary: Admin Centre Command Centre Testing Complete - All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) and frontend UI features verified. Login with 3 app options, Admin Dashboard, Employee Management with permission matrix, and Create Lead functionality all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Login page shows all 3 app options: ServiceBook, Sales CRM, Admin Centre
Login with Admin Centre (maharathy/Charu@123@) redirects to /workspace/admin correctly
Login returns permissions field in employee object as expected
Admin Dashboard shows Employee Management card and links to ServiceBook/Sales CRM
Employee Management page lists all employees with app access badges
Add Employee dialog has Basic Info, App Access toggles, and Feature Permissions matrix
Permission matrix shows features (Clients, Tasks, Assets, etc.) with View/Create/Edit/Delete/All columns
Edit Employee dialog populates existing data and shows permission matrix
Create Employee flow works - employee appears in list with correct badges
Switch App link in Admin sidebar navigates back to login page
Leads page has Create Lead button that opens create dialog with all fields
Manual lead creation API (POST /api/leads/manual/create) works correctly
seed_data_creation: Test employees created during pytest are cleaned up automatically. UI test created test_emp_1774196279 which was deactivated.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Centre fully implemented and tested. Employee permissions stored as nested dict: {app_id: {feature_id: {action: bool}}}. Login returns permissions in employee object. All CRUD operations for employees work. Create Lead button on Leads page opens dialog and creates leads via /api/leads/manual/create.

test_classes: TestAdminLogin - 4 tests (admin login, servicebook login, sales login, invalid credentials)
TestAdminEmployees - 1 test (get all employees with permissions)
TestEmployeeCRUD - 4 tests (create with permissions, verify in list, update permissions, deactivate)
TestManualLeadCreation - 2 tests (create lead, name required validation)
